creator: nsayer@kfu.com
text:
Actually, here's a better one. This one also bundles up all of the =
examples.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	gpshell
#	gpshell/pkg-descr
#	gpshell/Makefile
#	gpshell/distinfo
#	gpshell/pkg-plist
#
echo c - gpshell
mkdir -p gpshell > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gpshell/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >gpshell/pkg-descr << '76bb54276c6f199478b869b82649faf1'
XGlobalPlatform is a standard for the management of the contents on a =
smart card.
XMainly this comprises the installation and the removal of applications.
XThis project offers a C library and a command shell.
X
XThis port is of the shell. See the globalplatform port for the library.
X
XWWW: http://sf.net/projects/globalplatform
76bb54276c6f199478b869b82649faf1
echo x - gpshell/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >gpshell/Makefile << '0f9b4078c054eb0d95432d2cc3de60d4'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   oneko
X# Date created:        5 December 1994
X# Whom:                asami
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=3D      gpshell
XPORTVERSION=3D   1.4.2
XCATEGORIES=3D    security
XMASTER_SITES=3D   ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=3D     globalplatform/GPShell/GPShell-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=3D    ports@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=3D       GlobalPlatform shell for smartcard applet loading
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=3D	GlobalPlatform.4:${PORTSDIR}/security/globalplatform
X
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=3D autoconf:262
XCONFIGURE_ENV=3D	LDFLAGS=3D"-L${LOCALBASE}/lib" =
CPPFLAGS=3D"-I${LOCALBASE}/include"
X
Xpost-install:
X.if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/gpshell/
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/*.txt =
${PREFIX}/share/examples/gpshell/
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/HelloWorld* =
${PREFIX}/share/examples/gpshell/
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
0f9b4078c054eb0d95432d2cc3de60d4
echo x - gpshell/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >gpshell/distinfo << '63921aac7319bbfda8959a59c2dff3ae'
XMD5 (gpshell-1.4.2.tar.gz) =3D ce9b3dd774056ef37735ebf48f7cbea8
XSHA256 (gpshell-1.4.2.tar.gz) =3D =
8b247bed46e9778e70b6d8816411b4e6c3022fc15abb23f0431fcfb60a603fe9
XSIZE (gpshell-1.4.2.tar.gz) =3D 142354
63921aac7319bbfda8959a59c2dff3ae
echo x - gpshell/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >gpshell/pkg-plist << 'ddf3c2820d98d73b3680d0c70f6561a0'
Xbin/gpshell
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/HelloWorld.bin
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/HelloWorld.cap
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/HelloWorld.cap.transf
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloDelete.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloDeleteGP211.txt
=
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloDeletegemXpressoProR3_2E64.t=
xt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstall.txt
=
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallCyberflexAccess64k.tx=
t
=
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallCyberflexe-gate32k.tx=
t
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallGP211.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallNokia6131NFC.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallOberthurCosmo64.txt
=
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/helloInstallgemXpressoProR3_2E64.=
txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/list.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/listgemXpressoProR3_2E64.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/listgp211.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/putdefault-cflex.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/replacekey-cflex.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell/send_apdu.txt
X%%PORTEXAMPLES%%@dirrmtry %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/gpshell
ddf3c2820d98d73b3680d0c70f6561a0
exit
